info.name: Pulse Complete API
info.description: Complete Postman collection generated from the currently mounted Pulse modules in pulse/src/app.ts. Includes auth/token/id capture helpers and route coverage for auth, scim, organizations, billing, projects, analytics, ingestion, connectors, alerting, and event analytics.

exec: if (value === undefined || value === null || value === "") return;
if (obj[key] !== undefined && obj[key] !== null && obj[key] !== "") return obj[key];
const scopes = [payload, data, data?.user, data?.session, data?.organization, data?.project, data?.apiKey, data?.connector];

request.description: Authenticate with email and password. Returns session tokens or an MFA challenge.
Complete the second factor step after a password login.
Reset a password with a one-time reset token.
Fetch the currently authenticated user's profile.
Generate a fresh set of backup codes.
Create an MFA challenge for a logged-in user.
List all MFA devices for the authenticated user.
Disable MFA for the authenticated user.
Start TOTP, SMS, or email MFA setup.
Verify a challenge code without needing the user session.
Confirm a newly created MFA device.
List active sessions for the authenticated user.
Revoke every session except the current one.
Refresh an access token using the httpOnly refresh_token cookie.
Log out the current session and clear the refresh token cookie.
Public health check for the auth module.
